'''thahushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabinmate|cabinmate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-h-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabinmate|cabinmate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thahushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæhishith|thæhishith]] || [[word:thæhishij|thæhishij]] || [[word:thæhishish|thæhishish]] || [[word:thæhishi|thæhishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thahuhushuth|thahuhushuth]] || [[word:thahuhushuj|thahuhushuj]] || [[word:thahuhushush|thahuhushush]] || [[word:thahuhushu|thahuhushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahushuth|thahushuth]] || [[word:thahushuj|thahushuj]] || [[word:thahushush|thahushush]] || [[word:thahushu|thahushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahufshuth|thahufshuth]] || [[word:thahufshuj|thahufshuj]] || [[word:thahufshush|thahufshush]] || [[word:thahufshuf|thahufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thahushuthu|thahushuthu]] || [[word:thahushuju|thahushuju]] || [[word:thahushushu|thahushushu]] || [[word:thahushuku|thahushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thahushuth|thahushuth]] || [[word:thahushuj|thahushuj]] || [[word:thahushush|thahushush]] || [[word:thahushu|thahushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thahushuthul|thahushuthul]] || [[word:thahushujul|thahushujul]] || [[word:thahushushul|thahushushul]] || [[word:thahushukul|thahushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thahushuthuthu|thahushuthuthu]] || [[word:thahushujuju|thahushujuju]] || [[word:thahushushushu|thahushushushu]] || [[word:thahushuku|thahushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thahushuthun|thahushuthun]] || [[word:thahushujun|thahushujun]] || [[word:thahushushun|thahushushun]] || [[word:thahushukun|thahushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thahushuthuoro|thahushuthuoro]] || [[word:thahushujuoro|thahushujuoro]] || [[word:thahushushuoro|thahushushuoro]] || [[word:thahushukuoro|thahushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
